title: RubyDungPlus
description: A mod that overhauls few rd-132128 systems and adds few decorational blocks.
body:
###  btw this is a jar mod!
this mod overhauls the rd-132128
###  adds :
- 5 Saves instead of one
- settings menu
- blockid system
- Seperate textures instead of storing everything in an atlas
- and more!
### following blocks
1. dirt
2. planks
3. log
4. slab(double slab too)
5. tree sapling
6. gravel
7. Dynamite
8. Sand
 - And More!
### Controlls :
- WASD : move
- Q/E : select block
- U : settings
- G : unfocus mouse
- esc : exit game
### Settings Explained :
- TickSpeed: change how many blocks a tick are checked
- RenderDistance: 0 Full world, 4 Tiny Render Distance, 3 Default Render Distance, 2 Small Render Distance, 1 Huge Render Distance
